nasb.text: Let the labor be heavier on the men, and let them work at it so that they will pay no attention to false words.”

esv.text: Let heavier work be laid on the men that they may labor at it and pay no regard to lying words.”

cnv.text: 你們要把更重的工作加在這些人的身上，好使他們專心作工，不聽謊言。”

ccb.text: 你们要加重他们的工作，他们就无暇再听那些蛊惑人心的话了！”
